title: peristylus citrinus
intro: Peristylus citrinus, also known as the yellow helmet orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. Peristylus citrinus has been used to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, offering benefits such as relieving congestion and soothing sore throats. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
